title: Terrarian Spirit
description: Terraria-themed Minecraft HUD and GUI (& more!)
body:
This texture pack changes some of Minecrafts HUD, GUI, and even some other elements to be heavily themed around Terraria, while still being very Vanilla friendly! All elements are based off of and/or color-picked from actual Terraria textures!

If you're interested in Terraria content in Minecraft, also check out my Fabric 1.21.1 mod, [Terrarian Might](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrarian-might)!

### Quick Disclaimer 
Due to how textures worked prior to 1.20.4, these versions may be partially incompatible with other resource packs, changing certain textures back to their default vanilla textures. If you dont use other resource packs for 1.20.3 (or below) that change the UI, you can ignore this message. Otherwise, here be dragons!

<details>
<summary>Texture Info</summary>

## Hotbar
- The hotbar is inspired by both Terraria's hotbar, as well as the fancy golden frames from its Heath/Mana bars!
- The offhand slot is the same, except it now uses colors from Terraria's ammo slots! It's also rounded and has a bit more detail!

## Health Bar
- Base hearts are modeled after Terraria's default hearts!
- Poison hearts are color-picked from the green part of the Rotten Chunks texture.
- Withered hearts are color-picked from the Writhing Remains item texture.
- Absorption hearts are modeled after the upgraded golden hearts, obtained after eating Life Fruit!
- Frozen hearts are color-picked from Ice Slimes, with a new snowy retexture!

## Hunger Bar
- Base hunger bars are very similar to the vanilla versions, but are mostly color-picked from the Exquisitely Stuffed buff icon!
- Hunger debuff hunger bars are modeled after Rotten Chunks!

## Experience
- The XP Bar (As well as the jump bars for when riding a mount) have been retextured to roughly match the Mana Bar from terraria, specifically the "Bars" Health and Mana Bar Style.
- XP orbs are modeled after Terraria's Mana!
- The enchanting table's XP Icons have been retextured to match the newly retextured XP orbs.
- The Bottle o' Enchanting is slightly modeled after Mana Potions, but stays faithful to the original minecraft texture!

## Bonus Textures
- The bubble bar is modeled after Terraria's own Breath Meter.
- The armor bar is modeled after the Defense icon in Terraria's inventory.
- Mount health bars are retextured to reference the Slimy Saddle dropped by King Slime!
- Empty bars now look much fancier!
- The crosshair attack indicator has been slightly altered.
- The hotbar attack indicator now uses a Copper Shortsword, with the red liquid dripping from it being alot more vibrantly colored.
- You can choose between Vanilla Minecraft's Split half hearts, or Terraria's Shrunken half hearts! Simply select the version you want to download, scroll down to the files, and select your prefered style! (Note: If downloading directly from the Modrinth App, it will always default to Shrunken hearts.)

</details>

## Modded Textures
There are plans to have support for MOST mods that affect Minecraft's HUD, whether that be adding a new health/hunger effect, or adding in a new resource bar entirely. Listed below are all of the currently supported mods:
- [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite) (by AmyMialee)
- [Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) (by doctor4t)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) (by squeek502)
- [Brewin' and Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) (by ProbablyEyes)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (by simibubi)
- [Defile](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) (by doctor4t)
- [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) (by MoriyaShiine)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) (by vectorwing)
- [Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum) (by SammySemicolon)
- [Moonlight Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) (by MehVahdJukaar)
- [Pick Your Poison](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-your-poison) (by doctor4t)
- [Stockpile](https://modrinth.com/mod/stockpile_ati) (by AtiredDev)

## Planned Features
These are all of the currently planned texture changes! Note that nothing here is concrete, and I am only one dev, so it may take a while for these to be implemented!

### Next Update
- Nothing yet.....
### Considered
- ItemSwapper Mod GUI retextures (Similar to Hotbar retextures)
- More Enchancement support (Dash and Gale GUI)
- Malum support for Soul Ward [Shrunken UI]
### Not Likely/Far Future
- Status Effect icon retextures (Inspired by Terraria Status Effect icons)
- Calamity Health Upgrades as optional base hearts (1.20.4+ only)
- Complete GUI overhaul (Menu and button retextures galore!)
